name: Alexandra Chen
title: Senior Partner
bio: Alexandra specializes in complex mergers & acquisitions and securities law with 18 years of Wall Street experience. She has led over $2B in corporate transactions.

name: Marcus Rivera
title: Criminal Defense Attorney
bio: Marcus is a former prosecutor turned defense attorney with an exceptional track record. He has successfully defended clients in over 200 criminal trials.

name: Priya Patel
title: Family Law Specialist
bio: Priya brings compassion and sharp legal strategy to every family law case. She is particularly known for her sensitive handling of child custody disputes.

name: James O'Brien
title: Litigation Partner
bio: James has tried more than 300 civil cases to verdict and is widely regarded as one of Boston's premier trial lawyers. He is a frequent speaker at legal conferences.

name: Sofia Nguyen
title: IP & Tech Counsel
bio: Sofia combines her engineering background with deep IP law expertise to protect innovation for startups and Fortune 500 companies alike.

name: David Okonkwo
title: Immigration Attorney
bio: David has helped thousands of families navigate the complex US immigration system. His multilingual ability and cultural sensitivity set him apart.
